code: import{useState}from'react';export function useLocalStorage(key,initialValue){const[storedValue,setStoredValue]=useState(()=>{try{const item=window.localStorage.getItem(key);return item?JSON.parse(item):initialValue;}catch{return initialValue;}});const setValue=value=>{try{const valueToStore=value instanceof Function?value(storedValue):value;setStoredValue(valueToStore);if(valueToStore===null||valueToStore===undefined){window.localStorage.removeItem(key);}else{window.localStorage.setItem(key,JSON.stringify(valueToStore));}}catch(err){console.error('localStorage error:',err);}};return[storedValue,setValue];}
